_comment: Transformer trust inference model configuration — FIXED v2
_changes_from_v1: dropout: 0.1 → 0.2  (stronger regularization, prevents overfitting easy synthetic data)
epochs: 50 → 80  (more budget; early stopping will trigger before 80 anyway)

architecture._note: output_activation=none: model outputs raw logit. BCEWithLogitsLoss applies sigmoid internally.

quantization.note: Post-training static quantization reduces model to ~6-8 MB

training._loss_note: pos_weight = n_legit/n_adv computed automatically from training set

trust_scoring._adv_threshold_note: P(adversarial) threshold = 1 - tau_min = 0.35. Agent is flagged when sigmoid(logit) > 0.35.
